scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter "./artifacts/api-server" --filter "./artifacts/sukoon" run build && node scripts/postbuild.mjs
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.hostinger-build: npx pnpm install && npx pnpm run build
